notes:
🎮 Aura v0.3.0 - Major Uninstall Feature Release

🎮 NEW: Game Uninstall Feature
- Platform support: Steam, Epic Games, Ubisoft Connect, GOG
- Two-click confirmation to prevent accidental uninstalls
- Seamless UI integration with uninstall button in game cards
- Registry integration for GOG uninstaller detection

🎨 UI/UX Improvements
- Red-themed uninstall button with trash icon
- Visual feedback with hover states and confirmation animations
- 'Sure?' confirmation text on second click
- Auto-reset after 3-second timeout

🔧 Technical Updates
- Rust backend with cross-platform command execution
- Proper TypeScript interfaces and type safety
- Robust error handling and state management
- Clean game removal logic

🐛 Bug Fixes
- Fixed all Rust compilation syntax errors
- Corrected winreg usage and type annotations
- Resolved variable shadowing conflicts
- Addressed unused variable warnings
